<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Creative Coordination Support Bundle / Creative Professional Coordination Package / Workspace Coordination Bundle / Property Search Concierge / Business Networking — these combined creative add-on services are not covered by any service_type or included_features in the template', 'Details about artistic or creative workspace suitability (e.g., lighting for photography, studio zoning, creative district appeal)', 'References to community networking or professional collaboration opportunities (e.g., access to creative industry network, coworking collaborations)', 'Specific descriptions of building amenities like rooftop terrace, fitness center, art gallery space — amenities are not fields in property_listings', 'Mixed residential/business zoning or flexible zoning for live-work setups — zoning aspects are not represented in the template']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "10, ['Property listings with price, size, layout type (open_concept or loft_style), and location (downtown, west_end, etc.)', 'Property features such as smart_home, energy_efficient, recently_updated, character_home, modern_development', 'Condo fees and property taxes using condo_fees_monthly and property_taxes_annual', 'Financing options including down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, closing costs, title insurance, and documentation_required', 'Legal service packages with cost, currency, and service_level (basic or premium)', 'Moving services with service_level (standard, premium, white_glove), cost, and included features (packing, unpacking, insurance_coverage)', 'Utility setup packages with type (basic, premium), cost, and included services (electricity, water, internet, phone, smart_meters)', 'Timeline coordination for move-in or completion dates using timeline_coordination fields', 'Service coordination or booking confirmations using service_coordination and booking_confirmation communication types', 'Total package summaries combining property, legal, moving, and utilities cost into grand_total with currency and payment_schedule']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Creative Coordination Support Bundle / Creative Professional Coordination Package / Workspace Coordination Bundle / Property Search Concierge / Business Networking — these combined creative add-on services are not covered by any service_type or included_features in the template', 'Details about artistic or creative workspace suitability (e.g., lighting for photography, studio zoning, creative district appeal)', 'References to community networking or professional collaboration opportunities (e.g., access to creative industry network, coworking collaborations)', 'Specific descriptions of building amenities like rooftop terrace, fitness center, art gallery space — amenities are not fields in property_listings', 'Mixed residential/business zoning or flexible zoning for live-work setups — zoning aspects are not represented in the template']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
